If you go any deeper into the forest, you might run into monsters. If you have no
business there, you probably shouldn't go...

It's our father and mother's grave. The two who sacrificed themselves to protect us
from monsters... there wasn't a single thing left to bury in the earth.

I didn't want to see any more tragedies caused by monsters. So I decided to become an
adventurer with Mana, to protect people. To create a world where orphans like us
aren't born anymore...

...Did I make a mistake? I was entrusted by my parents to protect Elly... And yet, I
let that girl slip from my grasp......

Dad, Mom... I'm sorry... If only I hadn't left the village and stayed by her
side......

Ugh...I'm sorry, Dad, Mom... I'll definitely save Elly from this village... Please
forgive me for leaving your graves behind...

This grave belongs to Mana's mother. There isn't a single weed around it, and it's
well-maintained. Elly must be looking after it for her.

This grave belongs to Mana's mother. Not a single weed grows around it; it's
meticulously maintained. Even after all she's been through, Elly still cares for
it...

Oh, \n[1]? It feels like it's been a while since I last saw you. I haven't seen your
face at all for about a year...

Huh? You were traveling to the Royal City? What's that, I'm so jealous...! Sigh, I
wanna get out of this backwater village too...

Haaah... Every single day, it's the same old faces. How boring... I wonder if a
handsome man will just pop up from somewhere...

Ever since the construction at the lord's place finished, we've started seeing that
filthy ugly bastard around the village again! Ugh, I hate it...!

But seriously, your little sister... I can't believe she's so comfortable flirting
with that smelly fat guy... I could never do it myself...

Those bastards are getting carried away, aren't they... Maybe I should go tell the
village chief about them........

What? Oh, you're mad at those guys? It's awful, really. Just because they have big
dicks, why do they act so high and mighty?

...Well, but you know, the fact that the men get so worked up like that... I think
your little sister might be partly to blame too, don't you?

I mean... she only pretends to resist at first, but as soon as they start fucking
her, she immediately starts moaning loudly. If you see something like that, it's only
natural for stupid men to get carried away, right?

I'm sure that girl has a strong sex drive just like those men. Ugh, how awful...
Females whose only talent is luring in males, and the stupid males who swarm around
them...

I mean...your little sister was always with Mana-chan, so maybe she developed some
kind of complex? I mean, you and Dario were always chasing after Mana-chan's ass.

And then her rival disappears, and suddenly all the village men start fawning over
her... Of course she'd get carried away...! If just offering up her body gets her
pampered by the men...!

Well, but... A woman who lets herself get laid so easily just to be accepted by
men... Honestly, as a fellow woman, it's embarrassing... Oh, no! Just kidding, just
kidding...!

Hey, Elly. Good work with the laundry... Thanks as always.

\SE[4]...What? It's unusual for you to come here. You're usually wandering around aimlessly
at this time, or silently swinging your sword at that scarecrow...

Yeah, I'm taking a break from training for now... I was thinking I'd like to help you
with your work.

\SM[pop2]\SE[11]Wha!? Onii-chan!? Laundry...!? The training-obsessed idiot who only ever holds a
sword or a spoon while he's awake...!?
Th-that's rude...! I can use a fork and knife too, you know! Geez!

I've been relying on you too much, leaving all the housework to you. So while I'm
taking a break from adventuring... I want to help you, as a way of thanking you for
always taking care of me.

........So, wh-what do you think? Did my feelings get through to you...? Please,
Elly, let me help you...!

\SE[10]...O-okay. But you have to do exactly as I say...? I don't know what you might do,
Onii-chan...

...? Did something just shine at the bottom of the river...? What is this...

The village chief's wife's grave... Her chronic illness had worsened quite a bit
before we left the village, but... I see, she passed away...

When we were young and taken into this village, until we were old enough to take care
of ourselves, the three of us were allowed to live in the village chief's home.

While the chief was often away from home during the day, his wife would look after
us. She was so kind, we quickly grew attached to her...

Thank you, grandma... Thanks to you, I've grown into such a fine adult... I'm sorry
it took me so long to say it.........

Thank you, Grandma... I will never forget the kindness you gave me... May you rest in
peace........
Grandma... ...Were you being kind to us just so you could treat Elly like this too?

Teaching Elly how to cook... was it all for the sake of the village men...? If that's
true, then I...

...Yeah, that did happen...so nostalgic... \. \.\SE[4]\COM[blow]Actually, remembering it is
pissing me off... That bastard Dario has been trash since we were kids...!

Ahaha... Dario tends to act without thinking things through... So he and Elly never

\SE[17]...Of course, there's no way I could get along with an idiot like that! We fought
every single time we saw each other...!

Haha, yeah, that's right... ...But you know, I might have been a little jealous of
you two.

I was, well, kind of shy back then... I used to think it'd be nice if I could talk to
someone seriously like that.

\SE[20]...Hmph, I don't think it was anything that great. But well, thinking about it now...
Running around playing with friends like that is something you can't do once you're
an adult...
Looking back now, maybe those are good memories too...?

What's this, something fell... Ah, that!? I recognize this...! Isn't this the hair
tie Mana gave Dario as a birthday present a long time ago!

Why is it here... Did Dario throw it away? Damn... Even if it's a gift from
childhood, to throw away something made with such heartfelt feelings...!

...I remembered Mana's face when she was working so hard to make it, back when she'd
just learned how to sew... She tried so hard, and that bastard Dario...!

Since it rained all day yesterday, a large puddle has formed... Small insects and
animals had gathered on the water's surface, seeking a place to play.

...These kinds of forest creatures... Elly and I aren't really good with them, but
surprisingly, Mana seems to like bugs like these...

Come to think of it, it was right around here... Not long after we first met, this is
where Mana first opened up to us about that hobby of hers...
